sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n53373" key="karki/nwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καρκῐ´ν-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n53373.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">formation of a cancerous growth</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.41</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
